//: esbuild transpiles ALL of src/. tsc typechecks Pocket Pi's own orchestration code (the pi-full session harness). The runtime layer (src/runtime/**) and the pi-ai/undici adapter glue (src/trimmed/**, undici-stub) are deliberately loose polyfills/adapters over upstream's runtime shapes — typechecking them against the very APIs they reimplement is counterproductive.
